extension.name: Time Machine
extension.description: Retroactively apply the full SDD workflow to existing codebases — analyse, spec, and ship feature-by-feature
extension.author: te3yo

commands.name: speckit.time-machine.analyze
commands.description: Scan the codebase and generate a sequenced feature queue

commands.name: speckit.time-machine.next
commands.description: Run the full SDD workflow (specify → clarify → plan → tasks → implement) for the next queued feature

hooks.prompt: Feature implemented. Continue to the next feature in the queue?

config.name: time-machine-config.yml
config.description: Time Machine configuration (branch prefix, skip patterns, etc.)
